items.name: Mass-Assignment-Vulnerability-Vertical-Privilege-Escalation-
items.description: The application’s registration logic blindly trusts all incoming form data. Attackers can inject hidden parameters (e.g., role=admin) into the registration request, tricking the backend into creating administrator accounts. This results in unauthorized access to restricted system functions
